evals.prompt: 我刚买了一台腾讯云服务器，想把 OpenClaw 部署上去，帮我检查一下服务器环境是否满足要求
evals.expected_output: Should trigger server-deploy skill, run check_env.py to verify Docker, memory, disk, ports etc.

assertions.description: Should reference the environment check script

evals.prompt: 帮我在这台服务器上完成 OpenClaw 的首次部署，从安装 Docker 到启动服务全部帮我搞定
evals.expected_output: Should trigger server-deploy init workflow: check env, install Docker, configure .env, run docker-setup.sh, health check

assertions.description: Should mention Docker installation or usage

evals.prompt: OpenClaw 有新版本了，帮我更新一下，记得先备份
evals.expected_output: Should trigger update workflow: backup first, pull latest, rebuild, restart, health check
